reference: If you take my opinion, then I would suggest that yes, you can get pregnant. However, this pregnancy can be prevented by using a postcoital contraceptive pill in two doses, apart. Later, you can confirm your pregnancy with a urine pregnancy test or an ultrasound test.
text: If you take my opinion, then I would suggest that yes, you can get pregnant; however, this pregnancy can be prevented by using a postcoital contraceptive pill in 2 doses apart. Later, you can confirm your pregnancy with a urine pregnancy test or an ultrasound test.
